name: Slack-to-GPT-Chain-Aggregator

nodes.name: Slack Trigger
nodes.description: Initiates on Slack command or message

nodes.name: Switch
nodes.description: Routes based on command category (sales, finances, contacts, products, etc.)

nodes.name: Summarizer
nodes.description: Summarizes and formats results for clean Slack response

nodes.name: Slack Client Chat
nodes.description: Posts invoice or final message to client

description: Chains GPTs, logs structured output to Drive/Sheets, and summarizes for internal and client-side Slack delivery.
